title: The Adventure Modpack
description: Experience new lands, blocks, items, and treasures in this modpack. The Adventure Modpack adds mods to make your game more exciting, detailed, and adventurous.
body:
![Adventure Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b57ad5f0d238719fa811551bc096e9f81b08bf.png)
# Introducing The Adventure Modpack
Experience new lands, blocks, items, and treasures in this modpack. The Adventure Modpack adds mods to make your game more exciting, detailed, and adventurous.

![Maple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6b579f2167411fb9a625f175cc5e32650d867c9_0.webp)

![Silver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f434cef2600d0c0259784f69dcac49682c086d4c_0.webp)

![Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bd9431e406a6351991b9e90a1772c0d7ec82be7_0.webp)

![Redwood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f326f6647d83108b2ee40e9c5ced691e3e1868f1_0.webp)

![Coffee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d5db88fd45f3d13e24737182a1f61589875dde8_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Mods Used</summary>
- Simple HUD Enhanced
- Redwood
- TerraBlender
- Xaero's World Map
- Farmer's Crops
- Magic Mod
- Iris Shaders
- Sodium
- Text Placeholder API
- Custom Weapons
- Coffee Variants
- Essential Mod
- Mod Menu
- Colorful Torches
- TerraBiomes
- Colorful Copper Lanterns
- Fabric API
- Individual Keep Inventory
- Simple Voice Chat
</details>
